assignment_description:
Faceted Style
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ VIEW
Watch the tutorial and refresh your memory about your tools.
∞ Video Link: Lettering 2: Faceted Style

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS
"Faceted Style" Ch.4 p.40-41

➜ PRACTICE
Follow the steps in the book, incorporating tips from the tutorial. Begin working through the letters of the alphabet and the numbers 0-9. This will take two weeks to complete.

Faceted Style (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ STUDY
Observe closely the example letters and numbers on p.41.

➜ PRACTICE
Finish drawing the letters of the alphabet and the numbers 0-9 in the faceted style. If you finish early, practice drawing your name in the faceted style.

Vintage Circus Style
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ VIEW
Watch the tutorial.
∞ Video Link: Lettering 2: Vintage Circus Style

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS
"Vintage Circus Style" Ch.4 p.42-43

➜ PRACTICE
Follow the steps in the book, incorporating tips from the tutorial. Begin working through the letters of the alphabet and the numbers 0-9. This will take three weeks to complete.

Vintage Circus Style (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ STUDY
Observe closely the example letters and numbers on p.43.

➜ PRACTICE
Continue drawing the letters of the alphabet and the numbers 0-9 in the vintage circus style.

Vintage Circus Style (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ RECAP
Talk about the characteristics of the vintage circus lettering style.

➜ PRACTICE
Finish drawing the letters of the alphabet and the numbers 0-9 in the vintage circus style. When you finish, try drawing a quote in this style.

Bubble Style
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ VIEW
Watch the tutorial.
∞ Video Link: Lettering 2: Bubble Style

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS
"Bubble Style" Ch.4 p.44-45

➜ PRACTICE
Follow the steps in the book, incorporating tips from the tutorial. Begin working through the letters of the alphabet and the numbers 0-9. You will have two weeks to complete.

Bubble Style (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ RECAP
Observe closely the example letters and numbers on p.45. Talk about the characteristics of the bubble lettering style.

➜ PRACTICE
Finish drawing the letters of the alphabet and the numbers 0-9 in the bubble style. Work on the lower case letters as well.

Banners
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ VIEW
Watch the tutorial.
∞ Video Link: Lettering 2: Banners

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS
"Banners" Ch.5 p.61-69

➜ PRACTICE
Follow the steps in the book, incorporating tips from the tutorial. Begin working through the different banner types.

Banners (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ RECAP
Observe closely the example banners on pages 61-69. Talk about the characteristics of the many banner styles.

➜ PRACTICE
Finish drawing all of the different banner types in Ch.5.

Project #1
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering, watercolors, brushes, Art Book

➜ DEMONSTRATE
Draw your favorite quote from this term using one of the lettering styles and banners you have learned during the past 9 weeks. You may also incorporate styles that you learned in Level 1. You will have two weeks to complete this project.

➜ DRAW
Do this project in your Art Book using watercolors and brush.

Project #1 (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering, watercolors, brushes, Art Book

➜ DEMONSTRATE
Finish the quote that you began last week. Be sure to focus on the overall composition of your work.

➜ EVALUATE
Think about the colors that you are using for your composition. Also, be mindful of your baselines.

Exam Week

➜ EXAMS
Answer question(s) related to course.

Questions will come from:
Complete Book of Chalk Lettering
assignment_teachersNote:
★ Lettering: Level 2 — TERM 1 EXAM QUESTIONS
· Show your project #1 to an adult.

· Demonstrate one lettering style from this term and explain it to an adult.

Frames & Borders
⍞ Materials:The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ VIEW
Watch the tutorial.
∞ Video Link: Lettering 2: Frames & Borders

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS
"Frames and Borders" Ch.5 p.70-79

➜ PRACTICE
Follow the steps in the book, incorporating tips from the tutorial. Begin working through the different types of frames and borders. Be creative and make your own.

Project #2
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering, Art supplies

➜ DEMONSTRATE
Using the letters you have learned this term and all of the things you have learned in lettering to this point, create a gift for a loved one. Use pastel, watercolor, pencil or pen.

➜ DRAW
You have two weeks to work on this project.

Project #2 (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering, Art supplies

➜ DRAW
Continue working on your project. You should finish it today.

Exam Week

➜ EXAMS
Answer question(s) related to course.

Questions will come from:
Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering, Art supplies
